data.acceptance:
1. The + Add button rendered by `ActionButton` in `app-header-parts.tsx` has an explicit `h-8` class (or equivalent) matching the `ViewTab` buttons.
2. Both the simple button and the dropdown-trigger button variants of the Add button are updated.
3. The icon size (`size-4`), padding (`px-2.5`), and gap (`gap-1.5`) on the Add button remain unchanged.
4. Visual inspection confirms the Add button and a selected (purple) ViewTab appear the same height when placed side-by-side in the header.
5. All quality gates pass (`bun run lint`, `bunx tsc --noEmit`, `bun run build`).
